feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Iniziamo spiegando il problema.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che il telefono è rotto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Let's start by explaining the problem.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means that the phone is broken.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! 'A pezzi' enfatizza che è molto rotto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che lo schermo è distrutto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! 'A pezzi' emphasizes that it's badly broken.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means the screen is destroyed.

english: The battery doesn't last at all.
choicesEnglish: The battery doesn't last at all.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Un problema molto comune.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che la batteria si scarica subito.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! A very common problem.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means the battery drains immediately.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Il telefono sembra morto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non parte.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! The phone seems dead.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it doesn't start.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Questo è un danno grave.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, è finito in acqua.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! This is serious damage.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it ended up in water.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Non puoi usare il telefono se il touch è rotto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, riguarda la sensibilità dello schermo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! You can't use the phone if the touch is broken.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's about screen sensitivity.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Diventa molto caldo in poco tempo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che diventa bollente.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! It gets very hot in a short time.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it gets boiling hot.

english: How much does it cost to repair it?
choicesEnglish: How much does it cost to repair it?
How much time does it take?

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Chiediamo il prezzo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi il costo della riparazione.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! We're asking for the price.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for the repair cost.

english: How much time does it take?
choicesEnglish: How much time does it take?

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Chiediamo la durata del lavoro.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi il tempo necessario.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! We're asking for the duration of the work.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for the time needed.

english: Is it covered by the warranty?
choicesEnglish: Is it covered by the warranty?

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Molto importante per non pagare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi della copertura della garanzia.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Very important so you don't have to pay.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking about warranty coverage.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Meglio sapere se bisogna prenotare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi se devi fissare un incontro.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Better to know if you need to book.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if you need to schedule a meeting.

english: Can you give me a quote?
choicesEnglish: Can you give me a quote?
Can you give me the receipt?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Prima di riparare, meglio conoscere il costo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi una stima dei costi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Before repairing, better to know the cost.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for a cost estimate.

english: We need to change the screen.
choicesEnglish: We need to change the screen.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Questa è la soluzione del tecnico.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che va sostituito lo schermo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! This is the technician's solution.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means the screen must be replaced.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Il tecnico ci dice quando tornare.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, dice che sarà finito domani.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! The technician tells us when to come back.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it says it will be finished tomorrow.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Foto e contatti sono preziosi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi del recupero delle informazioni.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Photos and contacts are precious.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking about data recovery.

choicesEnglish: I will do the backup tomorrow.
I don't know what it is.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Per fortuna i dati sono al sicuro.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica che hai già salvato tutto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Luckily the data is safe.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates that you've already saved everything.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Spieghiamo l'urgenza.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che è uno strumento di lavoro.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! We're explaining the urgency.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it's a work tool.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Un problema comune con gli obiettivi.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non mette a fuoco.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! A common problem with lenses.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it doesn't focus.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Un comportamento anomalo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che si interrompe senza motivo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Abnormal behavior.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it shuts down without reason.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Forse il connettore è sporco.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che ha problemi a ricaricarsi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Maybe the connector is dirty.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it has trouble recharging.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Chiediamo il metodo di pagamento.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi se puoi pagare con carta.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! We're asking for the payment method.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if you can pay by card.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Per dimostrare l'acquisto o la garanzia.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, stai consegnando il documento fiscale.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! To prove purchase or warranty.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you are handing over the tax document.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Sostituzione del vetro protettivo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi di cambiare il vetro.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Replacing the protective glass.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking to change the glass.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Gli altri non possono sentirti.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, riguarda la parte che cattura l'audio.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Others can't hear you.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it concerns the part that captures audio.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Forse l'altoparlante è guasto.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non esce suono.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Maybe the speaker is faulty.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means no sound is coming out.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Un tasto fisico che non risponde.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che il tasto è incastrato.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! A physical button that doesn't respond.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means the button is jammed.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Per verificare se la riparazione è gratuita.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi se la garanzia è valida.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! To check if the repair is free.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if the warranty is valid.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Un problema per la garanzia.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non lo trovi più.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! A problem for the warranty.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means you can't find it anymore.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Il telefono non è reattivo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, riguarda la velocità del sistema.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! The phone is not responsive.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it's about system speed.

english: Do I need to reset everything?
choicesEnglish: Do I need to reset everything?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Chiediamo se serve un ripristino di fabbrica.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi se è necessario il reset.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! We're asking if a factory reset is needed.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if a reset is necessary.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Riguarda la ricezione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parla del segnale telefonico.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! It's about reception.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it speaks of the telephone signal.

choicesEnglish: How much do I pay now?

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Per avere una prova del prezzo pattuito.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, vuoi il preventivo su carta o email.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! To have proof of the agreed price.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you want the quote on paper or email.

english: How long does the repair last?
choicesEnglish: How long does the repair last?

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiediamo i tempi di consegna.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi la durata del lavoro.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! We're asking for delivery times.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for the duration of the work.

english: Can I pay with debit card?
choicesEnglish: Can I pay with debit card?

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Un metodo di pagamento elettronico comune.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi se accettano il bancomat.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! A common electronic payment method.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if they accept debit cards.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Significa che è nelle mani dei tecnici.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica che è in riparazione.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! It means it's in the hands of technicians.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates it's being repaired.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Per garantire la qualità.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, specifichi che vuoi componenti di marca.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! To guarantee quality.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you specify that you want brand-name components.

choicesEnglish: There is a lot of memory.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Devi cancellare qualcosa.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che la memoria è piena.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! You need to delete something.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means the memory is full.

english: I need to update the system.
choicesEnglish: I need to update the system.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Installazione dell'ultima versione software.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parli dell'aggiornamento necessario.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! Installing the latest software version.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're talking about the necessary update.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Un bel problema per sbloccare la SIM.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non lo ricordi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! A big problem for unlocking the SIM.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means you don't remember it.

italian: Mi serve aiuto per i dati.
english: I need help with the data.
choicesItalian: Mi serve aiuto per i dati.
choicesEnglish: I need help with the data.
correctAnswer: Mi serve aiuto per i dati.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Chiedi assistenza tecnica per i tuoi file.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi supporto per gestire i dati.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Ask for technical assistance for your files.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for support in managing data.

english: I can't find the photos anymore.
choicesEnglish: I can't find the photos anymore.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Sembrano scomparse.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che le immagini sono perse.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! They seem to have disappeared.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means the images are lost.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Chiedi se è possibile rimuovere il blocco.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi della possibilità di sblocco.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! You're asking if it's possible to remove the lock.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking about the unlock possibility.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Una frase drammatica per dire che i dati sono spariti.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non hai più nulla sul telefono.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! A dramatic phrase to say that data is gone.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means you have nothing left on the phone.

english: How much does the part cost?
choicesEnglish: How much does the part cost?

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Chiediamo il costo del ricambio.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi il prezzo del componente.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! We're asking for the cost of the replacement part.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for the price of the component.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Diagnosi del problema energetico.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, identifica il guasto nella batteria.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Diagnosis of the power problem.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it identifies the fault in the battery.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Forse è rotto il cavo o l'alimentatore.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non funziona.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Maybe the cable or the power adapter is broken.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it doesn't work.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Richiesta di prenotazione.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi di fissare un orario.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Requesting a booking.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking to set a time.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Chiediamo l'orario disponibile.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi l'ora del tuo arrivo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! We're asking for the available time.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for the time of your arrival.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Chiediamo se la riparazione è veloce.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi se puoi restare in negozio.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! We're asking if the repair is quick.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking if you can stay in the shop.

english: How much does the labor cost?
choicesEnglish: How much does the labor cost?

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Oltre al pezzo, si paga la manodopera.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi il costo della prestazione professionale.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! Besides the part, you pay for labor.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for the cost of professional service.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Piccoli segni sulla superficie.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che ci sono dei graffi.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Small marks on the surface.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means there are scratches.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Problemi di connessione senza fili.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che non si collega.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Wireless connection problems.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it doesn't connect.

feedback.correctItalian: Ottimo! Quando il software smette di rispondere.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che si ferma continuamente.
feedback.correctEnglish: Great! When the software stops responding.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means it stops continuously.

english: I need to change the cover.
choicesEnglish: I need to change the cover.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Protezione esterna del telefono.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, parli della custodia protettiva.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! External protection of the phone.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're talking about the protective case.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Riguarda i componenti fisici.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, indica un guasto fisico.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! It concerns physical components.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it indicates a physical fault.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Richiesta di supporto al tecnico.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, chiedi assistenza.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! Requesting support from the technician.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're asking for assistance.

feedback.correctItalian: Bravo! Gentili dopo un suggerimento tecnico.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, ringrazi per il suggerimento ricevuto.
feedback.correctEnglish: Well done! Polite after a technical suggestion.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you're thanking for the suggestion received.

choicesEnglish: I want to throw it away.

feedback.correctItalian: Esatto! Decisione di procedere con il lavoro.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, esprimi la volontà di aggiustarlo.
feedback.correctEnglish: Exactly! Decision to proceed with the work.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, you express the desire to fix it.

feedback.correctItalian: Giusto! Il tecnico può prendersi il suo tempo.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che puoi aspettare.
feedback.correctEnglish: Right! The technician can take his time.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means you can wait.

english: I'll be back in an hour.
choicesEnglish: I'll be back in an hour.

feedback.correctItalian: Perfetto! Indichi quando ripasserai dal negozio.
feedback.incorrectItalian: No, significa che rientrerai dopo 60 minuti.
feedback.correctEnglish: Perfect! You indicate when you'll return to the shop.
feedback.incorrectEnglish: No, it means you'll be back after 60 minutes.
